recentTweets.text:
Happy to announce that @TelcoinPaul will address this year's Flyover Fintech conference in Lincoln, Nebraska!

Join us August 4th to learn more from his insights into the future of banking, digital assets, and all things fintech.

Secure your spot today ➡️ https://t.co/DOhiQdn1sz https://t.co/BGyQDQ3Ifp

When we began drafting what became the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, I sat down with Ranking Member @RepCleaver to map a path forward.

What followed was a debate between the House and Senate– not political parties– just as the Founders intended.

More on this journey below👇 https://t.co/8hajR4NDho

🚨5 DAYS: Don't miss your chance to join this year's Flyover Fintech.

Explore topics ranging from digital assets and prediction markets to other fintech innovations.

Join us on August 4th in Lincoln, NE for panels, networking, and more! Register today➡️ https://t.co/DOhiQdn1sz https://t.co/UxObZ4fGfx
RT @congressfdn: WINNER: Best of Constituent Correspondence & Engagement — @USRepMikeFlood #DemocracyAwards https://t.co/aQlc3tMarq

📺SOON: My remarks accepting @congressfdn's 2026 Democracy Award for Best of Constituent Correspondence & Engagement.

Representative government only works if people can reach their elected officials, and I'm honored my team and I earned this recognition!
https://t.co/OPvpcgCO7X

🚨6 DAYS: Secure your spot to this year's Flyover Fintech!

From regulatory leaders and expert panel discussions to networking opportunities, you won't want to miss this premier fintech conference on August 4th in Lincoln, NE.

Register here or below ➡️ https://t.co/DOhiQdn1sz https://t.co/n75Gdt8y6t

RuralSTAMINA will be a game changer for communities throughout Nebraska and Iowa.

Money going directly into our region's ag economy and workforce is a federal investment done right.

I have seen firsthand the work behind this partnership and the potential impact of this

Stopped by @LNKairport last week to get an update on their ever-growing operations, including their runway project.

As Lincoln continues to expand and become a hub of innovation, projects like this will only further boost our state’s economy! https://t.co/4l09dsUxS2

Nebraska has jobs waiting and families eager to put down roots in our state.

The problem? Not enough homes.

That's why I worked to pass the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act — cutting red tape, expanding housing supply, and making it easier for Nebraskans to afford a home. https://t.co/WjHar4Yp2F

🚨7 DAYS: Secure your spot to this year's Flyover Fintech conference, featuring guest speaker @CFTC Chair Michael Selig!

Each year, this conference brings leaders and innovators in digital assets, banking, and more to Lincoln, Nebraska.

Register today: https://t.co/DOhiQdn1sz https://t.co/CEkcur3rWm

Great to join @mapacog for a housing tour of the Omaha area.

The Omaha area continues to grow, especially in communities like Papillion.

As Chairman of the Housing & Insurance Subcommittee, I appreciated speaking with local developers and community partners during this tour! https://t.co/AmqbF0BKj2

Visited the Lincoln @DeptVetAffairs Clinic this past week.

It’s always great to hear about their priorities and innovations in serving the needs of our nation’s veterans! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/P7r12l6x1b

Lindsey Graham was a gem of a man who dedicated his life to advancing the conservative movement. His persistent advocacy for strong American leadership on the global stage will be deeply missed.

Beyond politics, on a flight to Lincoln several years ago, we enjoyed swapping https://t.co/SVwdSW1J1r
RT @SpeakerJohnson: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is now law. House Republicans worked hard to ensure this legislation will pave the…
RT @FinancialCmte: A major win for American families. The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is now law, delivering reforms that will increas…
RT @RepFrenchHill: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is now law, and @USRepMikeFlood made the trip down to Maumelle, Arkansas to help me…

Great to be in Arkansas this morning with @RepFrenchHill, Chairman of @FinancialCmte, to celebrate the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act becoming law!

Without the help and leadership of Chairman Hill, @RepMaxineWaters, and @repcleaver, this law wouldn’t be possible. https://t.co/fSo7gQWzmG

For more details on how this landmark legislation impacts homeownership and tackling America's housing crisis, click here 👇
https://t.co/aH26o2554N

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is legislation that Americans can be proud of.

This meaningful, bipartisan housing law helps put the American dream of homeownership back within reach of more working families.

I joined @RepFrenchHill today to detail our historic bill ⤵️ https://t.co/22ekp3nLPk

The landmark 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is now officially law!

Tune in to my joint press conference with @RepFrenchHill celebrating this historic win👇
https://t.co/gvG0uja2CV
Thank you, Bellevue! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/tK08Y5kyW1

🚨HAPPENING NOW: Tune in to my Bellevue Town Hall ⏬
https://t.co/WA76KSmSRc
Here's to 250 more years of the greatest country in the world. Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/EDYPVz80AV

Honored to welcome a group of veterans to Battle Creek today as they marked the halfway point of their ride across the Great American Rail-Trail.

A great way to kick off a weekend of celebrating America's 250th birthday. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/uzHoxQmycc

Met with Emil Michael, who serves as the Undersecretary of War for Research & Engineering as well as the Chief Technology Officer for the @DeptofWar.

I will continue working to support innovation and provide the resources needed to keep our military the strongest in the world.🇺🇸 https://t.co/w1C9yYHOxn

This week, the House passed my bill reauthorizing TRIA.

Created after the 9/11 attacks, TRIA has thankfully never paid out a claim.

Extending this program with key reforms gives greater stability for businesses and insurers alike. More on these wins from my floor remarks⤵️ https://t.co/EUu5CHd0lJ

Spoke with @PatientCitizen this week in Washington, including Cassandra from Lincoln, who shared her experiences accessing dialysis.

Ensuring access to reliable dialysis care is increasingly crucial for Nebraskans across our state and remains a top priority of mine in Congress. https://t.co/MZbTYOLQL7

Today's Supreme Court ruling is a win for commonsense laws that protect female athletes by keeping men out of women's sports, just like we have passed in Nebraska.

Women's sports are for women, and I’m glad SCOTUS agrees with reality.
https://t.co/8Gb10qdrbx

June is National Dairy Month!

With nearly 50,000 dairy cows and thousands of jobs supported statewide, Nebraska’s dairy industry continues to grow and expand.

From the farm to the processing plant, Nebraska dairy helps feed families across our nation and around the world 🥛🐄 https://t.co/QEVR70Gyq9

Joined my friend and colleague @RepCleaver on @CNN to discuss our historic housing bill now that it's passed Congress.

For too long, hardworking Americans have been priced out of the housing market. Our bill helps make the dream of homeownership a reality again.

More here 👇 https://t.co/Mv2DIwyMmp

Welcomed this year’s Congressional Art Competition winner, Janiyah of Bellevue West, to Washington, D.C. this week!

Janiyah's winning artwork, 'Crash Landing,' is now on display in the U.S. Capitol alongside pieces by other talented high school students from across the country. https://t.co/RGDiSMj3gV
Joining @the535news live!
🚨Tune in now for a discussion on all things housing with @PunchbowlNews! 👇
Beautiful night to celebrate the incredible team who helped make the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act a reality! https://t.co/wAhYJSb2k0

RT @SteveScalise: 🚨 ANOTHER WIN FOR AMERICAN FAMILIES 

The House just passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act to cut red tape, expand…

After launching this effort early last year with @repcleaver, the House has passed our landmark housing package:

🏡 More families can achieve homeownership
⬇️ Housing costs will come down
✂️ Burdensome red tape slashed

Looking forward to President @realDonaldTrump signing this! https://t.co/ibNY5M0mwZ
RT @PunchbowlNews: 🏠 This morning, we launched the third feature of our editorial series, The Future of Housing, in partnership with @Owner…

We're one step closer to passing the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. I'm proud of this landmark win for housing affordability and grateful to @RepFrenchHill for his leadership in getting us here.

Looking forward to sending this bill to President Trump's desk this week!
Happy Father's Day, Nebraska! https://t.co/8vYEFrldC4

My office was happy to welcome Korean Deputy Consul General Joonseok Wee to Lincoln yesterday.

Nebraska and Korea have many opportunities to strengthen trade relations. Glad to hear this was a productive conversation and that we could showcase the Good Life! 🇺🇸🇰🇷 https://t.co/QtmVk1VfP7

Nebraska ag producers continue to face natural hardships, from persistent drought and devastating wildfires to severe storms and flooding.

Through these trials, they are pressing on with the grit that has always defined Nebraska’s farmers and ranchers.

Today, I ask all https://t.co/MIrPEG7o0K

RT @Plains_Sentinel: DHS: Alleged Omaha Ringleader of Terrorist Plot Is an Illegal Immigrant
https://t.co/ZhebgnCN9b

The man arrested in Omaha for plotting a White House attack entered our country illegally. DHS said his goal with the attack was to be "as deadly as we can get."

Open borders and unenforced immigration laws threaten our national security and the safety of Nebraska communities.

Met with students from Lincoln last week during their trip to D.C. for @COETalk's National Student Leadership Congress.

Great hearing their stories and goals as they take advantage of opportunities like TRIO programs that help get them ready for college and future careers! https://t.co/xJKglsl4EZ
RT @FinancialCmte: The Committee's bipartisan INVEST Act modernizes the "accredited investor" definition so education, professional credent…

RT @PunchbowlNews: 📢 Join us next Wednesday, June 24, at 9 a.m. ET for Summit: The Future of Housing. 

👉 Click the link to learn more and…

Honored to announce that my office has received the @congressfdn Award for Excellence in Constituent Correspondence & Engagement!

This award reflects our commitment to ensuring everyone in our district can connect with and be heard by their government.
https://t.co/m8Gy4KIpDB

Details on my bill here: https://t.co/0NRnle7iPn

My remarks on the House floor detailing this bill after it was included as part of the broader INVEST Act ⤵️ https://t.co/qsMdDQhGtd

He's right, and I have a bipartisan bill that would do this. @brian_armstrong 

The Equal Opportunity for All Investors Act allows any investor that passes a financial literacy test to become an accredited investor.

Last Congress, the bill got 383 votes in the House. Even

“The work done by both chambers reflects how the Founders intended Congress to operate: the House and Senate came together, made compromises, and found common ground to move this much-needed legislation forward."

My full statement on this agreement below 👇 https://t.co/oQrNZLRryj

More details about what this crucial bill will do for working families nationwide ⤵️
https://t.co/n7i7d0piIO

I'm grateful to the brave men and women in law enforcement who stopped a planned attack at Sunday’s UFC event at the White House, especially the @NEStatePatrol, who supported @FBIOmaha in arresting an Omaha man identified as a ringleader.

Political violence has become far too

Always insightful to meet with @NAMIC – especially when the Chair of their Board of Directors is a Nebraskan!

We discussed the challenges facing the insurance industry and ways to help lower costs for consumers while ensuring a strong and reliable insurance market. https://t.co/EfRXQ7I1xC

More on my latest bipartisan housing bill ⤵️
https://t.co/HCAWU9oCoB

While well-intentioned, current BABA requirements make it more expensive to build homes, pricing out working families and adding red tape.

America has a housing supply problem. My ‘Build Housing Affordably Act’ cuts barriers, lowers costs, and will help build more homes 🏡 https://t.co/fc3tx3jHfw

🚨ICYMI: Last week, I recognized County Attorney Joe Smith on the House floor for his more than 40 years of service to Madison County.

As he closes out his ninth and final term serving Madison County, all of Nebraska thanks Smith for his dedication and leadership.

My remarks 👇 https://t.co/oCir4aARKN

In 2024, Section 702 of FISA stopped an ISIS plot to carry out a mass casualty attack at a Taylor Swift concert in Vienna.

Yesterday, House Democrats blocked its renewal. Democrats are gambling with American lives to score political points. https://t.co/9es9Iy7wmL

Homes aren't assets, they are personal.

Building more homes will lower costs and get more families into their first home.

That is what our landmark housing bill is all about.

Joined @RepublicanStudy's podcast recently to discuss why passing a housing bill is so crucial⤵️ https://t.co/Ki7mNTgMlE

Today, I presided over the House floor as @HouseGOP voted to fully fund Border Patrol and immigration enforcement.

Nebraskans are safer when our southern border is secure and criminals who are here illegally are removed from our streets. https://t.co/xBN5xnkAB7

RT @MainCaucus: Today, the Republican Main Street Caucus voted to keep our nation's borders secure.

Upon President @realDonaldTrump's sign…

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

https://t.co/cy8OIvbLdo

@RepFrenchHill, @US…

A home run hire for the @NebraskaChamber!

Joseph Young and his family are returning home to Nebraska as he steps into the role of President and CEO of the Nebraska Chamber next month.

Joseph will be excellent in this new role!
https://t.co/MNazjqKRHt

Great meeting with @NECattlemen during their DC visit!

We covered wildfire recovery, animal health, and how to keep Nebraska the 'Beef State.'

Nebraska beef helps feed America and the world, and I’ll continue backing policies that allow our ranchers and producers to succeed.🐄 https://t.co/bo60hxkVZ2

✅ Buy more ethanol
⛽️ Pass year-round E15
🌽 Go Huskers! https://t.co/CKu9Vmq8Sa

Stay up to date on news and resources here⤵️
https://t.co/s05B3rAlbZ

I am grateful @SecRollins and @USDA are working vigilantly to contain the confirmed case of New World Screwworm in Texas.

The USDA has been partnering with producers to prepare for NWS entering the United States. I encourage Nebraska producers to monitor USDA updates closely,

I voted last year to fund border security and enforce our immigration laws. Illegal border crossings have reached 50-year lows as a result.

While Democrats try to defund law enforcement and re-open our borders, I'm working to keep our country safe and our border secure. https://t.co/kPB6wTQYkj

Met with @NGFA – along with some of their Nebraska members – today to discuss the Farm Bill, trade, our nation's ag economy, and more.

Nebraska producers rely on transportation and trade, so it's always insightful to discuss how Congress can continue advancing our ag economy! 🚜 https://t.co/JLx2aWvWam
